name: ship-council
description: Multi-agent delivery workflow for coordinated software changes.

interface.longDescription: Ship Council turns a software change request into a controlled delivery loop with intake, impact analysis, research, proposal critique, contracts, implementation, review, security checks, verification, and bounded fix loops.
defaultPrompt: Use ship-council to plan and implement this change.
Run ship-council in auto mode for up to 3 fix loops.
Use ship-council to review and verify this feature.
